sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44946" key="eu(/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὕρησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, worse form of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὕρεσις</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0548.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:3:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3.1</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
